auto_replace_disabled.title: Auto-Replace disabled
auto_replace_disabled.description: Auto-Replace is disabled in Lost Entity Find & Replace integration settings. Enable bulk fix under **Settings → Devices & services → Lost Entity Find & Replace → Configure**, or use the edit links above to update references manually.
